name: Tempo Music
description: Publish, discover, purchase, and listen to music with a BRC-100 wallet.

groupPermissions.description: Publish songs to redundant UHRP storage, manage your Tempo catalogue, and approve music purchases in one grouped permission grant.

protocolPermissions.description: Publish and manage Tempo song tokens.
Exchange authenticated storage and wallet messages without separate prompts.
Create private nonces for authenticated storage and key-server sessions.
Use your identity for your artist library and authenticated actions.

basketAccess.description: Manage your published Tempo song tokens.

spendingAuthorization.description: Publish song tokens and purchase tracks without repeated spend prompts.

counterpartyPermissions.description: Trust Tempo's active storage providers and key server for authenticated publication, purchase, and royalty flows.

protocols.description: Exchange authenticated messages with each active storage provider.
Derive direct-payment keys for purchases and royalties.
